name: adversarial-peer-review
description: Run independent hypotheses, automatically wake peers for bounded challenges, and synthesize the surviving evidence.

agent_profiles.name: adversarial-review-lead
agent_profiles.description: Challenges competing findings and synthesizes only verified conclusions.
agent_profiles.instructions: Resolve disagreements with repository evidence. Preserve material uncertainty, reject unsupported consensus, and produce a prioritized synthesis with concrete file references.

agent_profiles.name: adversarial-reviewer-a
agent_profiles.description: Builds and tests the strongest primary hypothesis.
agent_profiles.instructions: Investigate the assigned hypothesis independently, verify concrete evidence, and request a peer challenge only when it can discriminate between plausible explanations.

agent_profiles.name: adversarial-reviewer-b
agent_profiles.instructions: Investigate independently, search for evidence that falsifies the leading explanation, and use a bounded peer response only for a concrete contradiction or missing check.

steps.description: Investigate independently, exchange bounded automatic response requests, then synthesize verified conclusions.

members.instructions: Challenge the strongest claims, resolve contradictions with direct evidence, and synthesize only after all generated response tasks finish.
Develop the strongest evidence-backed explanation and ask a named peer to challenge a specific uncertain claim when useful.
Seek disconfirming evidence and ask a named peer to resolve one concrete contradiction when useful.

tasks.description: Inspect the target independently, develop the strongest primary explanation, and identify evidence that would falsify it.
Inspect the same target independently, develop a competing explanation, and search for counterexamples to likely conclusions.
Review both investigations and every completed peer response, verify decisive claims against the workspace, and report the surviving explanation, contradictions, and remaining uncertainty.
